Package net.apartium.cocoabeans.spigot.schematic

Class SpigotSchematicFactory

java.lang.Object
net.apartium.cocoabeans.spigot.schematic.SpigotSchematicFactory
All Implemented Interfaces:
net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.SchematicFactory<SpigotSchematic>
@NullMarked @AvailableSince("0.0.46") public class SpigotSchematicFactory extends Object implements net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.SchematicFactory<SpigotSchematic>
Factory for creating SpigotSchematic instances and related metadata.

Implements the SchematicFactory interface for the Spigot platform.

Since:
0.0.46

    • createSchematic

      public SpigotSchematic createSchematic(Instant created, net.apartium.cocoabeans.structs.MinecraftPlatform platform, net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.SchematicMetadata metadata, net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.iterator.BlockIterator blocks, net.apartium.cocoabeans.space.AreaSize size, net.apartium.cocoabeans.space.axis.AxisOrder axisOrder, net.apartium.cocoabeans.space.Position offset, Map<Long,net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.format.BodyExtension<?>> bodyExtensions)
      Constructs a SpigotSchematic from the provided parameters.
      Specified by:
      createSchematic in interface net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.SchematicFactory<SpigotSchematic>
      Parameters:
      created - the creation timestamp
      platform - the Minecraft platform
      metadata - schematic metadata
      blocks - iterator over block placements
      size - the schematic area size
      axisOrder - the axis order for translation
      offset - the position offset
      bodyExtensions - body extensions
      Returns:
      a built SpigotSchematic
